description: Monitoring agent workflow — observation and alerting

phases.name: collect
phases.instruction: Gather current system metrics and logs. Check recent events.

phases.name: analyze
phases.instruction: Compare against baselines. Identify anomalies. Check for known failure patterns.

phases.name: assess
phases.instruction: Determine severity. Is this a new issue or recurring? What's the impact?

phases.name: report
phases.instruction: Generate clear status report. Alert on critical issues. Suggest remediation steps.

success_criteria: All anomalies are identified and categorized. Critical issues are escalated with clear remediation steps.
escalation_triggers: A critical system component is failing
